discrepancies: Issue #10 remained open after GOV-004 merge; closure evidence was added and the issue was closed before execution.

outcome.summary: Implemented synchronized bounded multi-agent governance for independent branch-local execution and Product Owner-controlled integration.

changes.purpose: Canonical autonomy, synchronization, ownership, download, amendment, handoff, and review policy.
Machine-readable active-task ownership and integration order.

deviations: GitHub CLI and terminal clone were unavailable; the connected GitHub interface was used for repository operations.

impacts.architecture: No product architecture change; repository operating-governance contract only.
impacts.security: Branch autonomy remains bounded; credentials, host changes, destructive actions, and external effects remain approval-gated.
impacts.integration: GOV-005 precedes ARCH-001 resumption; ARCH-001 must resynchronize after GOV-005.
impacts.residual_risk: Independent Claude review and Product Owner merge decision remain pending.

recommended_next_action: Run Claude four-eyes review from a separate branch against the GOV-005 draft PR.
